TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kasasilsil_no_Sakowan_no_Rosiya, title = Kasasilsil_no_Sakowan_no_Rosiya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kasasilsil_no_Sakowan_no_Rosiya} }

S.FORM: Kasasilsil no Sakowan no Rosiya Ira ko 85 ko kasasiromaroma no sakowan no Rosiya: 3 ko mipatosokan no sakakaay sifo a mikowan a taokay o Mosko Si, Senpitopaw Si ato Sayfanpaw Si. 46 ko etal sakowan(области／oblasts, "provinces") 9 ko salawacan sakowan(края／krais, "territories") 22 ko niyahpikowan a kitakit(республики／republics) 1 ko niyahpikowan(автономная область／autonomous oblast, "autonomous province") 4 ko niyahpikowan a niyaro' (автономные округа／autonomous okrugs, "autonomous districts")
S.PHON: kasasiɾsiɾ no~u sako~uwan no~u ro~usija ira ko~u ** ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u sako~uwan no~u ro~usija: * ko~u mipato~uso~ukan no~u sakakaaj sifo~u a miko~uwan a tao~ukaj o~u mo~usko~u si, sənpito~upaw si ato~u sajfanpaw si. ** ko~u ətaɾ sako~uwan(********o~ub~b~vɾasts, "pro~ub~vinʦəs") * ko~u saɾawaʦan sako~uwan(*****krais, "tərrito~uriəs") ** ko~u nijaħpiko~uwan a kitakit(***********rəpo~u~ub~b~vɾiʦs) * ko~u nijaħpiko~uwan(********** ********ao~u~uto~uno~umo~uo~u~us o~ub~b~vɾast, "ao~u~uto~uno~umo~uo~u~us pro~ub~vinʦə") * ko~u nijaħpiko~uwan a nijaro~uʡ (********** *******ao~u~uto~uno~umo~uo~u~us o~ukro~u~u*s, "ao~u~uto~uno~umo~uo~u~us ɬ~ɮistriʦts")
S.FORM: Kasasilsil no Sakowan no Rosiya Ira ko 85 ko kasasiromaroma no sakowan no Rosiya: 3 ko mipatosokan no sakakaay sifo a mikowan a taokay o Mosko Si, Senpitopaw Si ato Sayfanpaw Si. 46 ko etal sakowan(области／oblasts, "provinces") 9 ko salawacan sakowan(края／krais, "territories") 22 ko niyahpikowan a kitakit(республики／republics) 1 ko niyahpikowan(автономная область／autonomous oblast, "autonomous province") 4 ko niyahpikowan a niyaro' (автономные округа／autonomous okrugs, "autonomous districts")
